name: Okta App Access Without Assignment
description: Detects users authenticating to Okta applications without an active direct or group assignment.
query: WITH app_usage AS (SELECT actor_id AS user_id, target_app_id AS app_id, MAX(published) AS last_app_activity FROM okta_system_logs WHERE COALESCE(actor_id, '') != '' AND COALESCE(target_app_id, '') != '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(event_type, '')) IN ('user.authentication.sso', 'app.oauth2.token.grant') GROUP BY actor_id, target_app_id), effective_assignments AS (SELECT assignee_id AS user_id, app_id FROM okta_app_assignments WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(assignee_type, '')) = 'USER' AND LOWER(COALESCE(status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned') UNION SELECT gm.user_id AS user_id, ga.app_id AS app_id FROM okta_app_assignments ga JOIN okta_group_memberships gm ON gm.group_id = ga.assignee_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(ga.assignee_type, '')) = 'GROUP' AND LOWER(COALESCE(ga.status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned')) SELECT usage.user_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, usage.user_id) AS account_name, usage.app_id, COALESCE(app.label, app.name, usage.app_id) AS app_name, usage.last_app_activity FROM app_usage usage LEFT JOIN effective_assignments ent ON ent.user_id = usage.user_id AND ent.app_id = usage.app_id LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = usage.user_id LEFT JOIN okta_applications app ON app.id = usage.app_id WHERE ent.user_id IS NULL AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, 'active')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded')
remediation: Investigate app sessions that occurred without assignment and remediate by removing unintended access paths or creating explicit governed assignments.
